jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Nykaa
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nykaa. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Chandigarh-based team.

About Nykaa:
Nykaa is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
